zh.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys是Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd的女兒，於大約1265年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾。她於大約1303年與Madog ap Madog結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys是Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd的女儿，于大约1265年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾。她于大约1303年与Madog ap Madog结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys was born about 1265, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. She married Madog ap Madog about 1303. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys est née environ 1265, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. Elle a épousé Madog ap Madog environ 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys wurde um 1265 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd geboren. Sie hat um 1303 Madog ap Madog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys è nata il circa 1265 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. Lei sposato Madog ap Madog circa 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhysは約1265年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでRhys "Fongam" ap Gruffuddの娘として生まれた。約1303年にMadog ap Madogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys(은)는 대략 1265년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1303년 Madog ap Madog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. Ela casou-se com Madog ap Madog aproximadamente 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys родилась около 1265 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Madog ap Madog около 1303 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Arddun verch Rhys nació aproximadamente 1265, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Rhys "Fongam" ap Gruffudd. Se casó con Madog ap Madog aproximadamente 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
